name: what-fw
description: The closest framework to vanilla JS

scripts.release:verify: npm run -s lint && npm run -s hygiene:artifacts && npm run -s typecheck && npm run -s test && npm run -s build && npm run -s pack:smoke && npm run -s bench:gate && npm run -s test:e2e && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.test: npm run -s test:node && npm run -s test:devtools
scripts.test:node: node --test packages/core/test/*.test.js packages/router/test/*.test.js packages/compiler/test/*.test.js packages/server/test/*.test.js packages/create-what/test/*.test.js packages/mcp-server/test/*.test.js packages/devtools-mcp/test/bridge.test.js packages/devtools-mcp/test/tools.test.js packages/devtools-mcp/test/tools-interact.test.js
